reason: Enabling certmap in SSSD involves adding a configuration section to /etc/sssd/sssd.conf. This is a standard authentication hardening step that does not modify critical boot, partitioning, or firewall settings. If misconfigured, it may cause authentication issues but can be reverted by restoring the original config.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Incorrect certmap syntax could cause SSSD authentication failures; Service restart required; temporary interruption of SSSD-dependent logins
